error_signature: Paginator not going back to 1st page
title: Paginator not resetting to the first page
symptom: The paginator allows navigation to pages 2 and 3 but fails to return to page 1. The left arrow is missing in preview mode, and the right arrow is unresponsive.
applies_when: Items per page set to a specific number
not_this_if: Paginator works correctly in other contexts
root_cause: The paginator's behavior is affected by the configuration of items per page and offset. If the offset calculation references a disabled limit, it can lead to navigation issues, preventing the paginator from resetting to the first page.
fix_steps: Change the offset calculation from Clients.limit to 5
Test the paginator in preview mode
agent_instruction: Update the paginator's offset calculation to use a fixed number instead of the disabled limit.
